name: Jake Duesenberg
subject: See What Happened in the Senate?
body:
| [ ](http://www.action4liberty.com/?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=never_again_bill_senate&n=1)
---
Peter \-- **I have some exciting news. Rep Erik Mortensen's Never Again Bill just got introduced in the Minnesota Senate by Senator Mark Koran!** If passed, the [Never Again Bill](https://www.action4liberty.com/never_again_bill_the_only_legislation_that_ends_governor_s_unilateral_emergency_powers?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=never_again_bill_senate&n=2) would eliminate Governor Walz and future governors from unilaterally declaring an emergency. On top of that, the bill punishes a Governor with fines or jail time for infringing on our rights. And it also protects our small businesses by ensuring we all have a right to operate a business and earn income during emergencies. Plain and simple - this is the only legislation that truly Ends Walz' Emergency Powers for good. So I want to thank [Senator Koran](https://www.action4liberty.com/r?u=UdUBanIu4fbXqYu4bSwW_eYo8iVfNQjFsUbqM2vjwm-Ojkn81yTCv7Yg2rFomxNXSDqA7bURgdiDrvjGe1Vvsw&e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=never_again_bill_senate&n=3) for carrying the bill in the Republican controlled Senate. Of course introducing legislation is only the first step. Now we need it to pass and become law. We must send a powerful message throughout the country that Unilateral Emergency Powers can **NEVER HAPPEN AGAIN**! Unfortunately, we're about to enter the final month of the legislative session and a massive budget that fully funds Governor Walz' Administration is being crafted by just a handful of people. This budget would fund the same government being used to ATTACK our businesses! The objective of the Political Class is to make secret deals, stuff a bunch of garbage in a thousand page omnibus bill, and then tell everyone to vote for it.
## This is the way business is done...or, should I say, this is the way it used to be done.
We need your help to STOP THE BUDGET unless Walz' Emergency Powers are terminated and the Never Again Bill passes. But that will only happen one way: PRESSURE! You see, the three people meeting behind closed doors are Governor Walz, House Speaker Hortman and Senate Majority Leader Paul Gazelka. Walz can't fund his government unless he gets a budget bill to pass the House and Senate. So we must make it very clear there will be a MASSIVE political price to pay for Hortman and Gazelka to pass anything before passing the Never Again Bill. Hortman has a huge problem on her hands. If she wants to keep the Democrats in power in the Minnesota House, she can't afford to lose seats like Julie Sandstede, Dave Lislegard, Mike Sundin and Paul Markquart. **As you probably know, we hired doorknockers in these districts who are informing thousands of voters every week on how these Con Artists are voting. Now we are about to expand our operations once again to INCREASE THE PRESSURE in the final month. But we can't do it without your help.** | [](https://www.action4liberty.com/donate_end_walz_powers?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=never_again_bill_senate&n=4 "Help Us Increase the PRESSURE") [Help Us Increase the PRESSURE](https://www.action4liberty.com/donate_end_walz_powers?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=never_again_bill_senate&n=5)
---
And we know this is having an impact. Julie Sandstede and Dave Lislegard spent 10 minutes whining and complaining about us at their recent virtual townhall. Check for yourself.
[](https://www.action4liberty.com/delusional_democrats?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=never_again_bill_senate&n=6)
**Dave Lislegard and Julie Sandstede would ABSOLUTELY HATE it if you helped us out >>>> [DONATE HERE](https://www.action4liberty.com/donate_end_walz_powers?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=never_again_bill_senate&n=7).**
I wish we could put all the pressure on these vulnerable Democrats, then sit back and let the Republicans at the Capitol do all the fighting for us. But you and I know that's not going to happen.
So we're going to **bring the heat** to Paul Gazelka as well unless he assures Minnesota that the Republican controlled Senate won't pass a budget until the fraudulent Peacetime Emergency is ended and the Never Again Bill becomes law!
As you remember, we've been here before. In mid-April of last year, ONLY 15 HOUSE REPUBLICANS voted to End Walz' Emergency Powers when we brought forward the vote. Most Republicans cowered to Governor Walz at the time.
**It wasn't until we cranked up the calls to people in Republicans districts that they got the message loud and clear. By the end of April, all 59 Republicans voted with us!**
This is the most serious issue of our time! In one year, we have lost our Constitutional Republic as one man has taken over universal rule-making. There's no reason to fund our abusive state government unless we get it back! And that means Walz' Powers have got to go!
You and I are sick and tired of weak-kneed Republicans who are unwilling to STAND UP and fight the Democrats. So it's our job to make sure they know there is political pain for cowering again to the Democrat Machine and Governor Walz!
And that's why it's so critical that we have your help so we can make it very loud and very well known to everyone we can contact, that we will not accept Republican Senate Majority Leader Paul Gazelka selling us out and passing a budget before the Peacetime Emergency is ended and the Never Again bill is passed!
[**Help us pressure the key players in St Paul so we can End Walz' Emergency Powers and make sure it NEVER HAPPENS AGAIN. Pitch in $25, $50 or even $100 today to help fund our statewide Pressure Campaign. If you can do more, sponsor a doorknocker, lit and gasoline for a week with a $1,000 donation.**](https://www.action4liberty.com/donate_end_walz_powers?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=never_again_bill_senate&n=8)
With your help and support, we can hold these politicians accountable!
**In Liberty,

**
**Jake Duesenberg**
**President, Action 4 Liberty**
Action 4 Liberty
1920 Oakcrest Ave #5
Roseville, MN 55113
Action 4 Liberty · United States
This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail.com](dpwillis67@gmail.com). To stop receiving emails, [click here](https://www.action4liberty.com/unsubscribe?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=never_again_bill_senate&n=9).
You can also keep up with Jake Duesenberg on [Facebook](https://www.action4liberty.com/r?u=27Ax0UmWOX2J8J_QwK9Z6nyVoJL5zCIi1gu8lCoYmQrA8P7rhuOjJmdy-IRmglie&e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=never_again_bill_senate&n=10).
Created with [NationBuilder](https://www.action4liberty.com/r?u=SWqLExi-4iBlEOa5qgO58jA2d62deOsOLwOgchKDecY&e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=never_again_bill_senate&n=11), software for leaders.

name: Team Hagerty
subject: Tennessee Is Leading The Country
body:
#TeamHagerty Updates Straight To Your Inbox
No images? [Click here](https://hfs.cmail19.com/t/t-e-miktiyk-fuutjhhtj-o/) April 6, 2020 **Standing Up To Communist China** [](https://hfs.cmail19.com/t/t-l-miktiyk-fuutjhhtj-r/) Tennessee is leading the nation in standing up to the Communist Chinese regime and the threat they pose to our American way of life. Bill proudly stands by Tennessee's strong conservative leadership in their decision to ban the Chinese government-funded Confucius Institute from our state's public universities. The Communist Chinese regime is no friend to America. They must be held accountable for the predatory actions they take against the U.S. and our allies diplomatically, militarily and economically. It's time for the Biden administration to learn from Tennessee's example. **We Must Address The Border Crisis** [](https://hfs.cmail19.com/t/t-l-miktiyk-fuutjhhtj-y/) For weeks, there has been a growing immigration crisis impacting our border communities and the country. However, Joe Biden and the radical Democrats continue to fail the American people by not securing our southern border. The Biden Administration's weak immigration policies, like dismantling ICE, ending the construction of the southern border wall and releasing illegal migrants who test positive for COVID-19 into American communities, have created this unprecedented crisis. We must build the wall to secure our southern border in order to protect our national security. Bill will always stand up for the rule of law and fight to give our border patrol agents the resources they need to secure our borders. **Conservative Policies Work** [](https://hfs.cmail19.com/t/t-l-miktiyk-fuutjhhtj-j/) Tennesseans know conservative policies work because we see it right here at home. Thanks to the strong conservative leadership in our state, Tennessee continues to be one of the greatest places in the country to start and grow a business. This business-friendly environment ensures that Tennesseans have many opportunities to be successful and live the American Dream. Bill will continue to work alongside our state leadership to get government out of the way, cut unnecessary bureaucratic regulation, continue President Trump's winning streak on taxes, promote free trade, remove trade barriers, strengthen the regulatory review process, and encourage companies to do business in Tennessee. **It's Time To Open Our Schools** [](https://hfs.cmail19.com/t/t-l-miktiyk-fuutjhhtj-t/) Beginning yesterday, all Tennesseans over the age of 16 are eligible to receive a COVID-19 vaccine. This news comes alongside the research and studies showing that it's time to get students back in schools. Bill is fighting for Joe Biden and the Washington Democrats to put our students first, open our schools and secure our borders. [](https://hfs.cmail19.com/t/t-l-miktiyk-fuutjhhtj-i/)[](https://hfs.cmail19.com/t/t-l-miktiyk-fuutjhhtj-d/)[](https://hfs.cmail19.com/t/t-l-miktiyk-fuutjhhtj-h/)[](https://hfs.cmail19.com/t/t-l-miktiyk-fuutjhhtj-k/)[](https://hfs.cmail19.com/t/t-l-miktiyk-fuutjhhtj-u/) Team Hagerty
P.O. Box 150748
Nashville, TN 37215 [ Share ](https://hfs.cmail19.com/t/t-fb-miktiyk-fuutjhhtj-b/) [ Tweet ](https://hfs.cmail19.com/t/t-tw-miktiyk-fuutjhhtj-m/) [ Forward ](https://hfs.forwardtomyfriend.com/t-fuutjhhtj-76178D70-miktiyk-l-c) [Preferences](https://hfs.updatemyprofile.com/t-miktiyk-76178D70-fuutjhhtj-q) | [Unsubscribe](https://hfs.cmail19.com/t/t-u-miktiyk-fuutjhhtj-a/)
---

Bill proudly stands by Tennessee's strong conservative leadership in their decision to ban the Chinese government-funded Confucius Institute from our state's public universities. The Communist Chinese regime is no friend to America. They must be held accountable for the predatory actions they take against the U.S. and our allies diplomatically, militarily and economically. It's time for the Biden administration to learn from Tennessee's example. We Must Address The Border Crisis For weeks, there has been a growing immigration crisis impacting our border communities and the country. However, Joe Biden and the radical Democrats continue to fail the American people by not securing our southern border. The Biden Administration's weak immigration policies, like dismantling ICE, ending the construction of the southern border wall and releasing illegal migrants who test positive for COVID-19 into American communities, have created this unprecedented crisis. We must build the wall to secure our southern border in order to protect our national security. Bill will always stand up for the rule of law and fight to give our border patrol agents the resources they need to secure our borders. Conservative Policies Work Tennesseans know conservative policies work because we see it right here at home. Thanks to the strong conservative leadership in our state, Tennessee continues to be one of the greatest places in the country to start and grow a business. This business-friendly environment ensures that Tennesseans have many opportunities to be successful and live the American Dream. Bill will continue to work alongside our state leadership to get government out of the way, cut unnecessary bureaucratic regulation, continue President Trump's winning streak on taxes, promote free trade, remove trade barriers, strengthen the regulatory review process, and encourage companies to do business in Tennessee. It's Time To Open Our Schools Beginning yesterday, all Tennesseans over the age of 16 are eligible to receive a COVID-19 vaccine. This news comes alongside the research and studies showing that it's time to get students back in schools. Bill is fighting for Joe Biden and the Washington Democrats to put our students first, open our schools and secure our borders. Team Hagerty P.O. Box 150748 Nashville, TN 37215 |

name: Keep Florida Red
subject: DeSantis Bans Big Government Tyranny
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY KEEP FLORIDA RED**
body:
[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57121134:6m4hGBuAN:m:1:3206719985:0310CE630BBB25347E80CA2EE990C128:r "Headline") Peter: The left is going wild. Florida's Governor, Ron DeSantis, is opposing Joe Biden's "follow the science" mantra and putting FREEDOM first. In fact, just the other day he stood his ground against the liberal orthodoxy and has issued an executive order banning vaccine passports in Florida. He also did what Nancy Pelosi and Joe Biden have tried to prevent in Washington--he signed a liability shield for businesses into law that protects businesses from frivolous COVID-19 lawsuits, he refused to comply with "vaccine passports," and he threatened the federal government with a lawsuit so cruise ships could sail from Florida ports again. **[Ron is setting the standard for freedom across our nation, and he needs our support!](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57121134:6m4hGBuAN:m:1:3206719985:0310CE630BBB25347E80CA2EE990C128:r "Ron is setting the standard for freedom across our nation, and he
needs our support!")** Joe Biden wants to RAILROAD you into compliance with its tyrannical Executive Orders by using **" vaccine passports"** to force you into a medical procedure you may not need or want. Gov. DeSantis is STRIKING BACK and says: **NO VACCINE PASSPORTS.** [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57121134:6m4hGBuAN:m:1:3206719985:0310CE630BBB25347E80CA2EE990C128:r "KEEP FLORIDA RED")_" It's completely unacceptable for either the government or the private sector to impose upon you the requirement that you show proof of vaccine to just simply participate in normal society." - Gov. Ron DeSantis_ **[Will you stand with Governor Ron DeSantis in his fight to KEEP FLORIDA RED from Joe Biden's tyrannical "vaccine passports" with your urgent gift of $35, $50, $100, or even $500 or more NOW?](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57121135:6m4hGBuAN:m:1:3206719985:0310CE630BBB25347E80CA2EE990C128:r "Will you stand with Governor
Ron DeSantis in his fight to KEEP FLORIDA RED from Joe Biden’s tyrannical “vaccine passports” with your urgent gift of $35, $50,
$100, or even $500 or more NOW?")** The Left wants to punish DeSantis for not being submissive to their radical designs on your liberty, and he is the only one with guts opposing them. **We need to rally behind Ron now to thwart off these leftist attacks.** Florida's success has become a model conservative alternative to the job-killing destruction of liberal lockdowns, and Joe Biden's "follow the science" malarky. The Left hates DeSantis because he's proving them wrong time and time again. He's winning and the radical left darlings like Gretchen Whitmer of Michigan, Gavin Newsom of California and Andrew Cuomo of New York have all failed their states. **They can 't have a Donald Trump supporter like Ron DeSantis embarrass their lefty leaders, but he is doing just that, and Joe Biden is steaming under the collar.** **[Will you stand with Governor Ron DeSantis against the attacks from Joe Biden and other leftist radicals who want to control you with"vaccine passports" and other unconstitutional mandates? Donate $35, $50, $100, or even $500 and help Ron stop the radical assault on your personal liberty!](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57121135:6m4hGBuAN:m:1:3206719985:0310CE630BBB25347E80CA2EE990C128:r "Will you stand with Governor Ron DeSantis against the attacks
from Joe Biden and other leftist radicals who want to control you with “vaccine passports” and other unconstitutional mandates? Donate
$35, $50, $100, or even $500 and help Ron stop the radical assault on your personal liberty!")** DeSantis refuses to punish Floridians who don't want to take a vaccine. He understands a simple principle about what we face as Americans today. Your government has failed you; the media has failed you, the "scientific" establishment has failed you, big tech has failed you--but Ron DeSantis _will never fail you._ **DeSantis won 't stand for this radical encroachment on civil liberties and he's fighting back for us when no one else will.** The Left wants to control your life down to your very heartbeat and will brand all who refuse the vaccine with the "mark of the beast," banning YOU from society unless YOU comply. The Biden administration knows that many Americans already have immunity and don't even need a vaccine--it's ALL ABOUT CONTROL. **[Now Ron needs YOUR help. Please do not fail Ron.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57121134:6m4hGBuAN:m:1:3206719985:0310CE630BBB25347E80CA2EE990C128:r "Now Ron needs YOUR help. Please do not fail Ron.")** For a free nation,
[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57121134:6m4hGBuAN:m:1:3206719985:0310CE630BBB25347E80CA2EE990C128:r "Peter M. Feaman")
Peter M. Feaman
Chairman, Keep Florida Red
Republican National Committeeman, State of Florida | | [_KEEP FLORIDA RED_](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57121134:6m4hGBuAN:m:1:3206719985:0310CE630BBB25347E80CA2EE990C128:r "KEEP FLORIDA RED")

name: Patrick Murphy
subject: Fwd: Free to join us tonight?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Taking the Hill
body:
Good morning, Peter!

Checking in quickly today to make sure you saw the email below. [_**I 'd be honored if you joined me and Senator Booker at 7:30 pm ET tonight for a major campaign launch with Taking the Hill.**_](https://act.myngp.com/el/Snyk0L4EareAHSVSi426bjOqubW87kDXYN8WQ2oeO1Y=/G68In395LIDVZMRpqFQw5gai5cAAJvkqjp-kQChjJOE=)

Whether you're looking for a mid-week pick-me-up or you're interested in our work to revolutionize voter contact with veteran and military family voters, [_**this is exactly the evening event you need!**_](https://act.myngp.com/el/Snyk0L4EareAHSVSi426bjOqubW87kDXYN8WQ2oeO1Y=/G68In395LIDVZMRpqFQw5gai5cAAJvkqjp-kQChjJOE=)

You can pick up your ticket [_**here**_](https://act.myngp.com/el/Snyk0L4EareAHSVSi426bjOqubW87kDXYN8WQ2oeO1Y=/G68In395LIDVZMRpqFQw5gai5cAAJvkqjp-kQChjJOE=), but even if you can't attend tonight, [_**any contribution you can make helps us reach our $20,000 goal to launch our deep canvassing campaign to establish a majority of integrity in Congress.**_](https://act.myngp.com/el/Snyk0L4EareAHSVSi426bjOqubW87kDXYN8WQ2oeO1Y=/G68In395LIDVZMRpqFQw5gai5cAAJvkqjp-kQChjJOE=)

See you tonight - with Rosario Dawson's boyfriend! :-)

Yours in service,
Patrick

The Honorable Patrick J. Murphy
32nd Under Secretary of the Army
Fmr Congressman (PA-01)

**MARCO RUBIO CHALLENGES MLB COMMISSIONER MANFRED TO END LEAGUE'S TIES WITH CHINA AND CUBA**

_NEWSWEEK_

---

Friend,

The MLB is the latest to choose woke hypocrisy over standing up to China. They announced they are moving the MLB All-Star Game out of Atlanta, Georgia because they say Georgia's new election integrity laws do not "demonstrate their values." Meanwhile, they partner with Communist China and Cuba that deny their own people basic human rights. **I will not stop holding these faux-woke corporations accountable for their ties to China, but I need your help, Friend.**

| | [STOP THE WOKE LEFT >>](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001hYvzeXcsSVSpC_Dyj5qDtGPpb5Xy1x-b8rMDvkyC0xhAuzq3Axqfx7xdfd5Od4xvEPwpCsn862z3NqyjNiMnxC4HUQWzex0elcdQV5RAuasi_70UZEiu7n95gjfUL-471WvVV06A7rWX2Z04tYDUBOvmktH-UiBOXzHtnPCbYMO7SI0SmgRcG_GHuYs2ncKUDOpVsCYyIlwwzzlVk3dqjQTuEg_j3FncZ7Oo4oir_A8N1HkGLlfPDws_fYMOP6mlPfbbl6XpQiodQwAjjStRD-gff0lNDkoV0LWQyd1Qe1_yOo6bnqX8-eIx_pkjQpQjk1kNZBIZD3JMHVNtfO-lnUpcIxkMUEVB4_cvNBe2oiHctr201NXXRTFwR5hA8o0hAGviK6Llji65FjP7ZLAymzP9GI5GTtI7iPHiNj4F4Bs=&c=pbJAg8tEmakeu-TpRMmF_Chn49yT0w45hGhxHB04noluEeO73NMPQA==&ch=HqN0V_yw3-X2BptUIpt2XUKbW1E3YF9X824xixxqp6mU5HGJnYq8Cw== "STOP THE WOKE LEFT >>")
---

Just last week, MSNBC attacked me for holding Delta accountable for doing this same thing. It's only a matter of time until they attack me again. Little do they know that I don't care about their attacks, and _they will not deter me from always standing up to China and any company that attacks conservatives in the name of wokeness... all while partnering with Communist China._

**While I will never back down from this fight, this motivates the Left even more to have me GONE._[Chip in $35 to help me so I can stay in this fight>>](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001hYvzeXcsSVSpC_Dyj5qDtGPpb5Xy1x-b8rMDvkyC0xhAuzq3Axqfx7xdfd5Od4xvEPwpCsn862z3NqyjNiMnxC4HUQWzex0elcdQV5RAuasi_70UZEiu7n95gjfUL-471WvVV06A7rWX2Z04tYDUBOvmktH-UiBOXzHtnPCbYMO7SI0SmgRcG_GHuYs2ncKUDOpVsCYyIlwwzzlVk3dqjQTuEg_j3FncZ7Oo4oir_A8N1HkGLlfPDws_fYMOP6mlPfbbl6XpQiodQwAjjStRD-gff0lNDkoV0LWQyd1Qe1_yOo6bnqX8-eIx_pkjQpQjk1kNZBIZD3JMHVNtfO-lnUpcIxkMUEVB4_cvNBe2oiHctr201NXXRTFwR5hA8o0hAGviK6Llji65FjP7ZLAymzP9GI5GTtI7yy9mlzguBgU5S2-YRavPSQtlf6haQmoa&c=pbJAg8tEmakeu-TpRMmF_Chn49yT0w45hGhxHB04noluEeO73NMPQA==&ch=HqN0V_yw3-X2BptUIpt2XUKbW1E3YF9X824xixxqp6mU5HGJnYq8Cw== "Chip in $35 to help me so I can stay in this fight >>")_**

The MLB moved this game out of Georgia to punish them for passing laws to secure our election process. Yet, they partner with China and Cuba where they don't even hold real elections. This is full-blown hypocrisy. We can't let the Left get away with this.

I hope you'll join me in this fight,

We'll be honest with you, friend. The Democrats have targeted Ron more than we ever thought they would -- especially this early. And they're not alone. They have their allies in the media to advance their liberal agenda.

They have come at Ron with attack ads and their cancel culture already in Quarter 1. They want to get rid of all conservatives by any means necessary. **But, while the left work hard to twist his words and lie, Ron has been working hard for the American people.**
* During the First Quarter, he forced Democrats to read their COVID-19 bill on the Senate floor, making them hear what's actually in this bill. What a concept, huh?
* He has spoken out against the rampant cancel culture and refused to let the liberal media take his comments out of context to fit their biased narrative.
* Just last week, he headed down to see the Biden administration's border crisis. While he was appalled at what he saw, it was a reminder of what he is sent to Washington to do: protect and defend America.

It was a busy First Quarter, but that's what it takes to fight back against these Democrats.

Fast forward to today. We are a few days into Quarter 2, and we need to start these next few months off with a bang. If we don't make a strong start, the Democrats will pounce and use it as yet another opportunity to attack him. [**Can we please count on you to donate $10, $25, or even $50 to fight back against the Democrats before his opponents come up with another smear to take him down? **](http://ct4.americasnewsletter.com/t/9355837/224717773/197335/2/?ff2f3d13=cnAuMTAxNDk5&ff2f3d13=cnAuMTAxNDk5&x=faa0cf35)

Every donation will make a difference. [**We truly wouldn't ask if it wasn't important.**](http://ct4.americasnewsletter.com/t/9355837/224717773/197335/3/?ff2f3d13=cnAuMTAxNDk5&ff2f3d13=cnAuMTAxNDk5&x=e524250f)

Thank you for being a part of this fight,

Betsy

What is the Republican State Leadership Committee (RSLC)?
The Republican State Leadership Committee (RSLC) isn't just another alphabet soup political committee. We're the largest caucus of Republican state leaders in the nation with one unified goal: winning. Through innovative strategies and record-breaking support across all 50 states, we recruit, train, and support Republicans to state offices. Following a historically successful 2020 election cycle, state Republicans currently hold 62 of 99 state legislative chambers, 25 of 45 lieutenant governor seats, 28 of 50 secretary of state offices, and 11 of 12 independently-elected agriculture officials -- thanks in large part to the support from patriots like you. subject: Kamala is still missing?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Republican State Leadership Committee 1201 F Street, NW, Suite 675, Washington, DC 20004
body:
It's been 14 days.

body:
Let's call this what it is: A crisis.
[](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001Y-SPS9gnWW2RqGH8EeW0_rO5J6VcARt9e_J0wIU_aUX2ltqYUDdGDB9RZDisYn9qxQy1Oa7O9QYkLbCnIGK0jvUpHWpBK7lHYPbN_j_R84w_bPsjLRgltyqHOKmJw2GUP1P5ScwTP3uhG3JWxFqVpuwLFF54mr9b1o60V_8jZQt9-XS2-4NXI_FiQYIosfgF7OS8vboaRlBMQ1Zcp0ZPyb8fvT41MhF0_IckQnbSzHCjAn8BRAoms1WPulFfJzMeEh72XSsr2Zg2A8lWZ040OgPn3Wd_EMFPAxtaN1u0KR4FySoAlJehGB33zJ7-vwUuHULm_PFTHYXbjXmNY1rZzPr5lNX53aWLoJSy1ovDgSrf9KE5mszUkdzChoiYPEQPCMIaSP6RpF1HKhEfFaDdjg==&c=VM0xPCed4mVAMGqq0f_gOJl1vwhhJrxhxX2FFYmBrNvtk3m1FmZiwA==&ch=wHx-IEGDtGBV-qZF0kLpUvIziGdo-tWXMbH15k_3e1-AEbBRL5bX3w==)

Let's call this what it is: A crisis.

Joe Biden's border crisis continues to escalate day after day, and we can't afford to let things get any worse.

Last month, we saw more illegal immigrants cross the border than we've seen in any other month for the past FIFTEEN YEARS -- and those are just the ones we know about.
**I 'm calling on Joe Biden to secure our border NOW. Are you with me, Friend? ****[CLICK HERE to sign the petition >>](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001Y-SPS9gnWW2RqGH8EeW0_rO5J6VcARt9e_J0wIU_aUX2ltqYUDdGDB9RZDisYn9qxQy1Oa7O9QYkLbCnIGK0jvUpHWpBK7lHYPbN_j_R84w_bPsjLRgltyqHOKmJw2GUP1P5ScwTP3uhG3JWxFqVpuwLFF54mr9b1o60V_8jZQt9-XS2-4NXI_FiQYIosfgF7OS8vboaRlBMQ1Zcp0ZPyb8fvT41MhF0_IckQnbSzHCjAn8BRAoms1WPulFfJzMeEh72XSsr2Zg2A8lWZ040OgPn3Wd_EMFPAxtaN1u0KR4FySoAlJehGB33zJ7-vwUuHULm_PFTHYXbjXmNY1rZzPr5lNX53aWLoJSy1ovDgSrf9KE5mszUkdzChoiYPEQPCMIaSP6RpF1HKhEfFaDdjg==&c=VM0xPCed4mVAMGqq0f_gOJl1vwhhJrxhxX2FFYmBrNvtk3m1FmZiwA==&ch=wHx-IEGDtGBV-qZF0kLpUvIziGdo-tWXMbH15k_3e1-AEbBRL5bX3w==)**
**[**SECURE OUR BORDER**](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001Y-SPS9gnWW2RqGH8EeW0_rO5J6VcARt9e_J0wIU_aUX2ltqYUDdGDB9RZDisYn9qxQy1Oa7O9QYkLbCnIGK0jvUpHWpBK7lHYPbN_j_R84w_bPsjLRgltyqHOKmJw2GUP1P5ScwTP3uhG3JWxFqVpuwLFF54mr9b1o60V_8jZQt9-XS2-4NXI_FiQYIosfgF7OS8vboaRlBMQ1Zcp0ZPyb8fvT41MhF0_IckQnbSzHCjAn8BRAoms1WPulFfJzMeEh72XSsr2Zg2A8lWZ040OgPn3Wd_EMFPAxtaN1u0KR4FySoAlJehGB33zJ7-vwUuHULm_PFTHYXbjXmNY1rZzPr5lNX53aWLoJSy1ovDgSrf9KE5mszUkdzChoiYPEQPCMIaSP6RpF1HKhEfFaDdjg==&c=VM0xPCed4mVAMGqq0f_gOJl1vwhhJrxhxX2FFYmBrNvtk3m1FmZiwA==&ch=wHx-IEGDtGBV-qZF0kLpUvIziGdo-tWXMbH15k_3e1-AEbBRL5bX3w==)**
---
I can't sit back and let this happen any longer. Not only do we have a humanitarian crisis on our hands, our national security is being threatened as well. If Joe Biden and Kamala Harris aren't going to act on this crisis, then I will.

[ _**Join me today in calling on Biden to secure our border NOW >>**_](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001Y-SPS9gnWW2RqGH8EeW0_rO5J6VcARt9e_J0wIU_aUX2ltqYUDdGDB9RZDisYn9qxQy1Oa7O9QYkLbCnIGK0jvUpHWpBK7lHYPbN_j_R84w_bPsjLRgltyqHOKmJw2GUP1P5ScwTP3uhG3JWxFqVpuwLFF54mr9b1o60V_8jZQt9-XS2-4NXI_FiQYIosfgF7OS8vboaRlBMQ1Zcp0ZPyb8fvT41MhF0_IckQnbSzHCjAn8BRAoms1WPulFfJzMeEh72XSsr2Zg2A8lWZ040OgPn3Wd_EMFPAxtaN1u0KR4FySoAlJehGB33zJ7-vwUuHULm_PFTHYXbjXmNY1rZzPr5lNX53aWLoJSy1ovDgSrf9KE5mszUkdzChoiYPEQPCMIaSP6RpF1HKhEfFaDdjg==&c=VM0xPCed4mVAMGqq0f_gOJl1vwhhJrxhxX2FFYmBrNvtk3m1FmZiwA==&ch=wHx-IEGDtGBV-qZF0kLpUvIziGdo-tWXMbH15k_3e1-AEbBRL5bX3w==)

Thank you,

Joni Ernst
**[**SECURE OUR BORDER**](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001Y-SPS9gnWW2RqGH8EeW0_rO5J6VcARt9e_J0wIU_aUX2ltqYUDdGDB9RZDisYn9qxQy1Oa7O9QYkLbCnIGK0jvUpHWpBK7lHYPbN_j_R84w_bPsjLRgltyqHOKmJw2GUP1P5ScwTP3uhG3JWxFqVpuwLFF54mr9b1o60V_8jZQt9-XS2-4NXI_FiQYIosfgF7OS8vboaRlBMQ1Zcp0ZPyb8fvT41MhF0_IckQnbSzHCjAn8BRAoms1WPulFfJzMeEh72XSsr2Zg2A8lWZ040OgPn3Wd_EMFPAxtaN1u0KR4FySoAlJehGB33zJ7-vwUuHULm_PFTHYXbjXmNY1rZzPr5lNX53aWLoJSy1ovDgSrf9KE5mszUkdzChoiYPEQPCMIaSP6RpF1HKhEfFaDdjg==&c=VM0xPCed4mVAMGqq0f_gOJl1vwhhJrxhxX2FFYmBrNvtk3m1FmZiwA==&ch=wHx-IEGDtGBV-qZF0kLpUvIziGdo-tWXMbH15k_3e1-AEbBRL5bX3w==)**

Friend, Nancy Pelosi is mobilizing supporters nationwide to stand AGAINST the recall of Gov. Gavin Newsom in California. Clearly, she doesn't care that thousands of businesses across the state are closed permanently, thousands of children are falling behind because of no in-person instruction, thousands of vulnerable people are unable to access the COVID-19 vaccine, and thousands of hard-working Californians are unable to provide for their families. California is suffering because of Gov. Gavin Newsom's failed policies. Unlike Nancy Pelosi, I stand FOR the recall, and I want to know if you do too. I'm deploying this one-click flash poll to 10,000 Americans to gauge support of the recall movement. Will you let me know how you feel? All responses must be locked in no later than midnight tonight. name: Tom Fitton
subject: Fighting Illegal Alien “Sanctuary” Policies
body:
Many in the Biden administration would like nothing more than to use a "memory hole" to make disappear the misdeeds of the Clintons, Obamas and Bidens and their legion of cronies.

| |
---
|
---
|
---
| Dear Fellow American,

America is facing a _worsening crisis_ of uncontrolled illegal immigration ignited by the radical Biden immigration agenda.
In less than 100 days into the Biden presidency, we are witnessing a deeply destructive "Biden effect" at our southern border as his radical immigration agenda has become a magnet for renewed illegal immigration. That, my friend, is clear as day. By reversing the positive immigration policy changes made by the Trump administration of border security, deportation and construction of the wall the "Biden effect" is a growing disaster for America.
**_Today, under the Biden administration, the number of people illegally coming into the country is more than 6,000 per day ...that's six times the crisis level set by the Obama gang_**!
This Biden radical immigration agenda will most assuredly lead to millions more illegal aliens rushing into our country... jeopardizing our economy, our jobs, and our access to healthcare and education. **_It 's going to be bad for America._**
| [Contribute](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=53346&L=17813&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9uYXRlL3RoYW5rLXlvdS0xMzUvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249TWF5JnV0bV90ZXJtPU5vbi1Eb25vcnMmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9MjAyMTA0MDcxNDIxMDk=)
---

_That 's why I believe that this Biden radical immigration agenda represents the most important issue facing America_. No other issue so broadly affects every other issue like illegal immigration - whether it's our economy, foreign policy, culture, religion, crime, law and order, or even congressional apportionment.

**_So Judicial Watch is ramping up our courtroom strategies and taking on new battles_**.

Judicial Watch lawyers are battling open borders groups and the organized Left in the courts as the Left tries to _undermine important election integrity safeguards_ and make it easier for ineligible voters, including non-citizens, to vote in our elections...

Remember: The Left not only wants to make it easier for non-citizens to vote, they also want more illegal aliens to keep coming, be forgiven with amnesty and vote for _their_ candidates!

So in every way they can, the "open borders" Biden gang are attempting to overwhelm our system of controlled immigration and bring it down. That's why our fight against illegal immigration is so profoundly important...

...and why Judicial Watch's immigration law enforcement battles continue to expand, including our courtroom actions fighting illegal "sanctuary" policies!

But we already carrying a huge caseload, which is why I am asking you to **_[join our fight by making your best tax-deductible contribution now_** to help us with our work in support of the rule of law.](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=53346&L=17813&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9uYXRlL3RoYW5rLXlvdS0xMzUvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249TWF5JnV0bV90ZXJtPU5vbi1Eb25vcnMmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9MjAyMTA0MDcxNDIxMDk=)

We are up against _not only_ the radical Biden agenda, but _also_ mayors who support illegal sanctuary policies and politicians _in both parties_ who want to keep illegals flooding into our nation.

We are your independent conservative watchdog in Washington, and our work has never been more important. _Thank you!_

body:
The liberal media has enabled Democrats from the start. They continue to let the Dems actions go unchallenged while putting a positive spin on their constant failures.
**
We 're reaching out to you because we've noticed your area is experiencing some of the WORST media bias in the nation. We're working to fix that.**

Continue reading to see how you can help
⬇⬇⬇⬇

Democrats are completely out of control. Since taking over the White House and both Majorities, we've seen failure upon failure. Our borders are being overrun, schools remain closed and Biden's White House continues to unravel the success of Conservatives from the past four years.

Worst of all, the liberal media has enabled Democrats from the start. They continue to let the Dems actions go unchallenged while putting a positive spin on their constant failures.

**If you watch the news as much as we do, I 'm sure you're equally as nauseated by what we've been seeing. That's why we're trying to do something about it.**

We need to show the American people the truth about what the radical left is doing to our country. The best way to do that is by reaching out to each American DIRECTLY to ensure they know what's happening right under their noses.

Our goal is to get our message in front of as many people as we can.

The problem is, we can't rely on the media to help us spread this message. We have to do it on our own and that can be VERY expensive. **With your $10 or more, we will be able to broaden our reach and make sure Americans are aware of the TRUTH about Democrats and their plans for our country.**

[**Help Sponsor Conservative Ads In Your Area: Donate $10**](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001oSsC7lXmzA2sY3Di2jpyVq8DzkpA6JuoRtRR1Jvi1O91Lu3EqkWP_240aCVWQC42y9KArDG5OVf5a8Ig5tsc9iMSYufz_dNajF7n5pYyCIyKC573xUkaXw2xp_o8BBmqM-a8BIQdlOlcXgdc74TXC5nfuxNOXeKHUbLwJJxlVXK8cvHFRumL5cFzE950H8CqtNnjXDDMMrgeQ_5VZoOasvQNudm2MloCBQZtp9CpGCnJvAaD2dTm_cmZS-p8MFgbM_t-aywA4juaXAf94oMa2lllicMeRzDltB4dSMexCOyce_7py2TIl8U3EdBCoxNlbvjz8taaUmXj-kwxPuBGrwJcupAvXrT1paaoOMxGEV6DvrTRd_JvaxVYSSK-yZ9cgak7mmlBsyENbFXnG6xyh57YPGkqOGShNn5et9vaZ2VKoez_vzfNygTnHSGc0bPvdc3GqDar6N_6LgtLXDBXKdVGWMDzx2UMKQb0gVXbFKHD7Wz7C5jEgzFgFzxrAgjC&c=2Va_2wbEhAi3GChLtXPqHggN2PXVm1L7TmXmn02iSYhTfKGuVWKW2g==&ch=3ElYm-ElJWPvsyip2yU6bgdtVOGZ8nFpU3As08iv0qbOyfPMqip49g==)

Democrats, Big Tech and the liberal Media are all working to silence these messages, but with your help (and only your help) we can overcome these challenges and wake our country up to the liberal disaster we're currently experiencing.

If everyone receiving this email donates $10, it will be enough to sponsor our content to challenge the radical left within your community.

We can't allow Dems and their media cronies to dominate the airwaves and continue to deceive people. name: House Conservatives
subject: There’s a target on our backs.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRCC and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
National Democrats have named 22 House Republicans they'd like to take out next cycle.

****
🚨**BREAKING: HOUSE DEMOCRATS ANNOUNCE
OFFENSIVE TARGETS FOR 2022**🚨

National Democrats have named 22 House Republicans they'd like to take out next cycle. We're not going to lie to you, Fellow Patriot-our team is concerned.

These 22 conservatives now have TARGETS on their backs. Nancy Pelosi and her petty Democrat cronies will NOT STOP until they dominate Congress and widen their liberal majority in the House.

**They will not be satisfied until President Trump 's America First Agenda is just a fleeting memory in the history books.**

[**Fellow Patriot, we CANNOT stand idly by and watch this happen -we MUST protect these 22 House Republicans! That's why we've ACTIVATED 5X MATCHING until MIDNIGHT TONIGHT for YOU, a true Conservative!**](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001JH66WQcWLjRM50F4Mmqvq7RO26DkeIE3-JVQqkvfZYT0YuIlJcgPxvtsYyX3Xhuerp1uT9NCsXog77DOBH646vjuTDFTEC4lKHsVWUMjKQfhBSyqScpjsRlf0RDAOCOjFgoCeBo3HymTTNO1zPTkSs_oDg-f0rqllUL7tsJ2M9utOMMdZRTm80EbAEGQxEj6tC46FgT9FIS6DfBtSMpYdlJ2A8dcp5lp8FaMhG4x80ALDFIcCQFfrcbY9q6qVs7F9pOyLB2rmfg6wINcp6-Y2YFbcmhMRvgWtuFMH2Dj0PVNVzAGEsCY7EzPSV7KspzwkIhIFLH7svdZ3HWKDpGjh2GzCUmKuInERkPnae9Xu2sdLk034mTJvexkhzlK8sUJR3_gg8TPF6ILI7mdDId2_2Z59jhIaz4sEzHF6l3wzyxPXKjCCYnFNwIycMhK3N4K&c=sU0XO5O41Fz9ikJvqS0Fat68KNo5NB_GOnmsQEt5oSXbDZHNrrwnBw==&ch=d_0eA8o3Xv_fWqCNk96OaSoQrOJFFsTOIfMfZ4fDfTKxj1vGocoazQ==)
**500% Matching: ACTIVE! **
[**Put AMERICA FIRST: Take Back the House!**](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001JH66WQcWLjRM50F4Mmqvq7RO26DkeIE3-JVQqkvfZYT0YuIlJcgPxvtsYyX3Xhuerp1uT9NCsXog77DOBH646vjuTDFTEC4lKHsVWUMjKQfhBSyqScpjsRlf0RDAOCOjFgoCeBo3HymTTNO1zPTkSs_oDg-f0rqllUL7tsJ2M9utOMMdZRTm80EbAEGQxEj6tC46FgT9FIS6DfBtSMpYdlJ2A8dcp5lp8FaMhG4x80ALDFIcCQFfrcbY9q6qVs7F9pOyLB2rmfg6wINcp6-Y2YFbcmhMRvgWtuFMH2Dj0PVNVzAGEsCY7EzPSV7KspzwkIhIFLH7svdZ3HWKDpGjh2GzCUmKuInERkPnae9Xu2sdLk034mTJvexkhzlK8sUJR3_gg8TPF6ILI7mdDId2_2Z59jhIaz4sEzHF6l3wzyxPXKjCCYnFNwIycMhK3N4K&c=sU0XO5O41Fz9ikJvqS0Fat68KNo5NB_GOnmsQEt5oSXbDZHNrrwnBw==&ch=d_0eA8o3Xv_fWqCNk96OaSoQrOJFFsTOIfMfZ4fDfTKxj1vGocoazQ==)

We will level with you, Fellow Patriot.

Fending off attacks from National Democrats will not be easy. They want to grow the Squad and destroy our country. They will not go down without a fight. And here's the scary truth, and we're sure we're not the first one to tell you this because you're a TRUE American Patriot:

_**There 's NO WAY they'll stop at just 22 seats. **_

National Democrats are coming for every seat in the House of Representatives so they can ram through their SOCIALIST and LEFT WING agenda. We MUST fight back against them, stand with President Trump, and put America First.

[**Put AMERICA FIRST: Take Back the House!**](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001JH66WQcWLjRM50F4Mmqvq7RO26DkeIE3-JVQqkvfZYT0YuIlJcgPxvtsYyX3Xhuerp1uT9NCsXog77DOBH646vjuTDFTEC4lKHsVWUMjKQfhBSyqScpjsRlf0RDAOCOjFgoCeBo3HymTTNO1zPTkSs_oDg-f0rqllUL7tsJ2M9utOMMdZRTm80EbAEGQxEj6tC46FgT9FIS6DfBtSMpYdlJ2A8dcp5lp8FaMhG4x80ALDFIcCQFfrcbY9q6qVs7F9pOyLB2rmfg6wINcp6-Y2YFbcmhMRvgWtuFMH2Dj0PVNVzAGEsCY7EzPSV7KspzwkIhIFLH7svdZ3HWKDpGjh2GzCUmKuInERkPnae9Xu2sdLk034mTJvexkhzlK8sUJR3_gg8TPF6ILI7mdDId2_2Z59jhIaz4sEzHF6l3wzyxPXKjCCYnFNwIycMhK3N4K&c=sU0XO5O41Fz9ikJvqS0Fat68KNo5NB_GOnmsQEt5oSXbDZHNrrwnBw==&ch=d_0eA8o3Xv_fWqCNk96OaSoQrOJFFsTOIfMfZ4fDfTKxj1vGocoazQ==)

Fellow Patriot, we've gotten this far because of great supporters like you. Can you chip in ONE more time by MIDNIGHT tonight to **stand with President Trump and take back the House?**

Thank you for your support. Let's take back the House together!

Sincerely,

House Conservatives

[**Put AMERICA FIRST: Take Back the House!**](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001JH66WQcWLjRM50F4Mmqvq7RO26DkeIE3-JVQqkvfZYT0YuIlJcgPxvtsYyX3Xhuerp1uT9NCsXog77DOBH646vjuTDFTEC4lKHsVWUMjKQfhBSyqScpjsRlf0RDAOCOjFgoCeBo3HymTTNO1zPTkSs_oDg-f0rqllUL7tsJ2M9utOMMdZRTm80EbAEGQxEj6tC46FgT9FIS6DfBtSMpYdlJ2A8dcp5lp8FaMhG4x80ALDFIcCQFfrcbY9q6qVs7F9pOyLB2rmfg6wINcp6-Y2YFbcmhMRvgWtuFMH2Dj0PVNVzAGEsCY7EzPSV7KspzwkIhIFLH7svdZ3HWKDpGjh2GzCUmKuInERkPnae9Xu2sdLk034mTJvexkhzlK8sUJR3_gg8TPF6ILI7mdDId2_2Z59jhIaz4sEzHF6l3wzyxPXKjCCYnFNwIycMhK3N4K&c=sU0XO5O41Fz9ikJvqS0Fat68KNo5NB_GOnmsQEt5oSXbDZHNrrwnBw==&ch=d_0eA8o3Xv_fWqCNk96OaSoQrOJFFsTOIfMfZ4fDfTKxj1vGocoazQ==)

name: Mo Brooks
subject: I am honored to receive President Trump's endorsement and...
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY THE MO BROOKS FOR SENATE COMMITTEE
body:
Mo Brooks is a proven conservative that will be a fearless fighter in the Senate.
| | To keep receiving updates from my campaign, please add us to your address book.
---
[](https://mobrooksforsen.nationbuilder.com/r?u=O2VuetiQea1aep2z7TECUy6SeOo3fSqjV85jUBNqUYg&e=2bb0250de6a743cf472d1821e5b3b009&utm_source=mobrooksforsen&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=trump_endorsement_fundraising&n=1)
---

| Peter, I am proud to be the first to tell you that I have received **President Trump's endorsement for my campaign to U.S. Senate.** I have defended him against impeachment TWICE and have stood by his side when the Fake News Media, Socialist Democrats and weak-kneed establishment Republicans tried to take him down. [He believes I am the best candidate to represent the great state of Alabama through my proven conservative record and I am confident that with his support and yours we will Take America Back!](https://mobrooksforsen.nationbuilder.com/r?u=K115QJUsYIJk1EqYiO2oYl5kI5FGvvVrRHG_uYbe7RlPpz-iA1rBHpfW4vmnSS3XqfH5eiVHzs2zHgXvcg29g4pZhm5JioI46cM9JTOzqnnsdo_VprSJ9A3IXtVCh2lR&e=2bb0250de6a743cf472d1821e5b3b009&utm_source=mobrooksforsen&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=trump_endorsement_fundraising&n=2)
[](https://mobrooksforsen.nationbuilder.com/r?u=K115QJUsYIJk1EqYiO2oYl5kI5FGvvVrRHG_uYbe7RlPpz-iA1rBHpfW4vmnSS3XqfH5eiVHzs2zHgXvcg29g4pZhm5JioI46cM9JTOzqnnsdo_VprSJ9A3IXtVCh2lR&e=2bb0250de6a743cf472d1821e5b3b009&utm_source=mobrooksforsen&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=trump_endorsement_fundraising&n=3) As President Trump can vouch, when I have someone’s back, I don’t cut and run, I stand strong when the going gets rough. I stand up for what is right and fight for our nation, which is the greatest nation in history! From his own words:___"Few Republicans have as much COURAGE and FIGHT as Alabama Congressman Mo Brooks._ _Mo is a great Conservative Republican leader, who will stand up for America First no matter what obstacles the Fake News Media, RINOs, or Socialist Democrats may place in his path._ _Mo Brooks is pro-life, loves our Military and our Vets, will protect our Second Amendment, combat the Biden open border agenda, is fighting for voter integrity (like few others), and was the Co-Chair of our winning, and record setting, Alabama campaign in 2020._ _Mo Brooks has my Complete and Total Endorsement for the U.S. Senate representing the Great State of Alabama. He will never let you down!"_ **I am honored and humbled by President Trump's strong endorsement.[I ask all Americans who share our America First vision to heed and honor President Trump's request by joining our campaign.](https://mobrooksforsen.nationbuilder.com/r?u=K115QJUsYIJk1EqYiO2oYl5kI5FGvvVrRHG_uYbe7RlPpz-iA1rBHpfW4vmnSS3XqfH5eiVHzs2zHgXvcg29g4pZhm5JioI46cM9JTOzqnnsdo_VprSJ9A3IXtVCh2lR&e=2bb0250de6a743cf472d1821e5b3b009&utm_source=mobrooksforsen&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=trump_endorsement_fundraising&n=4)** Thank you for your support, Mo Brooks [P.S. I am proud that President Trump has chosen to endorse me for the third time. I will have his back. ](https://mobrooksforsen.nationbuilder.com/r?u=K115QJUsYIJk1EqYiO2oYl5kI5FGvvVrRHG_uYbe7RlPpz-iA1rBHpfW4vmnSS3XqfH5eiVHzs2zHgXvcg29g4pZhm5JioI46cM9JTOzqnnsdo_VprSJ9A3IXtVCh2lR&e=2bb0250de6a743cf472d1821e5b3b009&utm_source=mobrooksforsen&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=trump_endorsement_fundraising&n=5)

name: GOP Alerts
subject: Hundreds of people have DEMANDED voter ID, but YOU haven't! Tell us, do YOU support voter ID?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRSC
body:
We need to know- do you want voter ID laws?

Democrats have built a campaign war chest filled with MILLIONS going into this next election cycle. We need to make sure our Conservative candidates have the resources to fight back and win! If we miss this goal, we risk being outraised and outspent AGAIN.

name: Giffords.org
subject: Guns are being sold at record rates in 2021. We need background checks NOW >>
body:
#

Friends,
According to the FBI, March 2021 was the second highest month on record for firearms sales.
Last month, news of tragic mass shootings devastated the nation and recaptured its attention yet again. But make no mistake, gun violence never went away during the pandemic. In fact, it surged--and so did gun sales. With more guns in circulation than ever, we need to act fast to prevent more tragedies.
Right now, we're pushing the Senate to pass universal background checks. The House already passed a bipartisan bill, so now we need the Senate to have the courage to act.
During the pandemic, fearmongers pushed people to go out and purchase firearms. As life returns to normal, we need to do everything we can to stop guns from getting into the hands of the wrong people.
So today, we have to ask:
[**Will you make a donation to help us push the Senate to pass universal background checks? With guns being sold in record numbers, we can 't afford to waste another day. **](https://action.giffords.org/page/m/385ee175/78fba3aa/6370bf58/50aadbe3/2184116144/VEsH/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMTA0MDctMS1mdWxsIn0%3D/?g=VoprG3y8bT5gPy-pvV0V7pA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/giffords-em-apr21?refcode=em210407-1-full")
If you've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly:
| [Donate $10](https://action.giffords.org/page/m/385ee175/78fba3aa/6370bf58/50aadbe4/2184116144/VEsHAQ/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMTA0MDctMS1mdWxsIn0%3D/?g=VoprG3y8bT5gPy-pvV0V7pA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/giffords-em-apr21?express_lane=true&amount=10&refcode=em210407-1-full") | [Donate $25](https://action.giffords.org/page/m/385ee175/78fba3aa/6370bf58/50aadbe7/2184116144/VEsHAA/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMTA0MDctMS1mdWxsIn0%3D/?g=VoprG3y8bT5gPy-pvV0V7pA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/giffords-em-apr21?express_lane=true&amount=25&refcode=em210407-1-full")
---|---
[Donate $50](https://action.giffords.org/page/m/385ee175/78fba3aa/6370bf58/50aadbe6/2184116144/VEsHAw/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMTA0MDctMS1mdWxsIn0%3D/?g=VoprG3y8bT5gPy-pvV0V7pA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/giffords-em-apr21?express_lane=true&amount=50&refcode=em210407-1-full") | [Donate $100](https://action.giffords.org/page/m/385ee175/78fba3aa/6370bf58/50aadbf9/2184116144/VEsHAg/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMTA0MDctMS1mdWxsIn0%3D/?g=VoprG3y8bT5gPy-pvV0V7pA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/giffords-em-apr21?express_lane=true&amount=100&refcode=em210407-1-full")
---|---
[Donate $250](https://action.giffords.org/page/m/385ee175/78fba3aa/6370bf58/50aadbf8/2184116144/VEsHDQ/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMTA0MDctMS1mdWxsIn0%3D/?g=VoprG3y8bT5gPy-pvV0V7pA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/giffords-em-apr21?express_lane=true&amount=250&refcode=em210407-1-full") | [Other amount](https://action.giffords.org/page/m/385ee175/78fba3aa/6370bf58/50aadbe5/2184116144/VEsHDA/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMTA0MDctMS1mdWxsIn0%3D/?g=VoprG3y8bT5gPy-pvV0V7pA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/giffords-em-apr21?express_lane=true&refcode=em210407-1-full")
---|---
We expect universal background checks to come up for a vote in the Senate in the coming weeks. 90% of Americans agree there should be a simple background check before acquiring a firearm. So Congress needs to step up and represent their constituents.
Help us save lives and push the Senate to pass universal background checks. Timing is everything right now as more guns are being sold than ever before.
All our best,
Team Giffords
**[DONATE NOW](https://action.giffords.org/page/m/385ee175/78fba3aa/6370bf58/50aadbe3/2184116144/VEsEBQ/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMTA0MDctMS1mdWxsIn0%3D/?g=VoprG3y8bT5gPy-pvV0V7pA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/giffords-em-apr21?refcode=em210407-1-full")**

* * *
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. We try to send only the most important information and opportunities to participate via email, but click [here](https://action.giffords.org/page/m/385ee175/78fba3aa/6370bf58/50aadbfb/2184116144/VEsEBA/?g=VoprG3y8bT5gPy-pvV0V7pA "http://action.americansforresponsiblesolutions.org/page/unsubscribe") if you'd like to unsubscribe. Giffords PAC was started to support elected officials who step up to fight the gun violence epidemic. Thank you for standing with Gabby and Mark.

| | Patriot, **A brand-new smear campaign has been launched against me, but I am fighting back to expose the truth. **
The far-left New York Times has been publishing salacious allegations against me in an attempt to end my career fighting for the forgotten men and women of this country.

But the truth is, the mainstream media is publishing lies to try to take me down while covering up real scandals like Hunter Biden’s deals in Ukraine and Governor Cuomo’s attempted genocide against nursing homes. **It is a shame that the Left tries to drag my dating life into their political attacks, but it’s no surprise - when your ideas suck, you have to stoop this low. **

name: Greater Georgia
subject: WATCH: KELLY LOEFFLER SLAMS DEMOCRATS' MISINFORMATION CAMPAIGN, MLB ALL-STAR MOVE ON FOX NEWS
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Greater Georgia Action, Inc
body:
---
| | | | | |
---
| FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE WEDNESDAY, APRIL 7, 2021
WATCH: KELLY LOEFFLER SLAMS DEMOCRATS' MISINFORMATION CAMPAIGN, MLB ALL-STAR MOVE ON FOX NEWS
ATLANTA - Today, Greater Georgia Chairwoman Kelly Loeffler joined The Story with Martha MacCallum on Fox News to slam the Democrats' [misinformation campaign](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001blss0iiWUW29iw5WOSCxmTBmdu50GDUB3goqxrXuwAXVpH9r5a5F_7pMHwzftUaStJ25DzDqQplALwvVn6AW1mHykQss8Wom9HXZf4fWxu-7tQVbD9l4Lb823WnXBv49ml48MQKHYfThHNYbu5p5s-A_6_ZxLoin68yfDyIvGY0TuI1u26jzpS2txToTrWHUVCGVHA2d5_F1aAXp_OGKJdvQ8E9uo3GqfxJoJMrWsFZjtFX9GRy0a6bYX1qhrcBM40w63zGoupCii9ZVOLSQu5bfUphus96pax5CFS8Q1GnncWgBxZL2h8E_K6m8D5uuPiezr37oi7Y=&c=fMylzpC-8_xUlcGyslNt798xcwJQRnV1FaOks1Sdv2k8E7VVVVQ6OA==&ch=e2cbdk2rKPW4y_XExoTQdJqUJeV13-qgSU5xRJgA4n5ZECyGYbSJbg==) surrounding the Election Integrity Act. Specifically, Kelly condemned the [false smears](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001blss0iiWUW29iw5WOSCxmTBmdu50GDUB3goqxrXuwAXVpH9r5a5F_7pMHwzftUaSnslXptQHOKYDXMtbZcjpdys3MQ6vDpnmjYi0LM5CzSMoEgvyY9oXx7CRVCtGPgK2HlQ55_fd6xQtn_uJ4Z46nvZGRW6FU6yN3zR_yXGSlpro8maKNfTI2PJUvHFHTWd4yKae-jp-6sK7qu9qh2vLlw==&c=fMylzpC-8_xUlcGyslNt798xcwJQRnV1FaOks1Sdv2k8E7VVVVQ6OA==&ch=e2cbdk2rKPW4y_XExoTQdJqUJeV13-qgSU5xRJgA4n5ZECyGYbSJbg==) by Stacey Abrams, Joe Biden, and others, which experts project will cost Georgia more than [$100 million](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001blss0iiWUW29iw5WOSCxmTBmdu50GDUB3goqxrXuwAXVpH9r5a5F_2Z7sqyW5wEBvnZ3H7A_fENlSZfn4p__tNI8qknX-7KTmNWdsTXivJUwi2F_O8EzQM0v6_O36kOl14ltnB7dWFFLmFtxfPuJfPpVG2tVA6mn13gn82TjZ8WbVzRvUrYNgKpSOOZPYrVSBBMvOyNpUoIR_bVEQm5ROXXBrLE1npPdtFcKlVD0WIc=&c=fMylzpC-8_xUlcGyslNt798xcwJQRnV1FaOks1Sdv2k8E7VVVVQ6OA==&ch=e2cbdk2rKPW4y_XExoTQdJqUJeV13-qgSU5xRJgA4n5ZECyGYbSJbg==), hurting small businesses - especially those that are minority-owned.
Click [HERE](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001blss0iiWUW29iw5WOSCxmTBmdu50GDUB3goqxrXuwAXVpH9r5a5F_2Z7sqyW5wEBXKtj-bPrf86U520XhlsI6RbB-vamdNHqL6kbKM84wUhK_xTV2MYnFI3yctiLpWNWG8W0wm4_U1JNQZhpTHgtJA==&c=fMylzpC-8_xUlcGyslNt798xcwJQRnV1FaOks1Sdv2k8E7VVVVQ6OA==&ch=e2cbdk2rKPW4y_XExoTQdJqUJeV13-qgSU5xRJgA4n5ZECyGYbSJbg==) or the photo below to see the full clip:
---
| [ ](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001blss0iiWUW29iw5WOSCxmTBmdu50GDUB3goqxrXuwAXVpH9r5a5F_2Z7sqyW5wEBXKtj-bPrf86U520XhlsI6RbB-vamdNHqL6kbKM84wUhK_xTV2MYnFI3yctiLpWNWG8W0wm4_U1JNQZhpTHgtJA==&c=fMylzpC-8_xUlcGyslNt798xcwJQRnV1FaOks1Sdv2k8E7VVVVQ6OA==&ch=e2cbdk2rKPW4y_XExoTQdJqUJeV13-qgSU5xRJgA4n5ZECyGYbSJbg==)
---
| As Kelly said:
"[Biden's] comments [about boycotting Georgia] were incredibly irresponsible because he repeated misinformation that had been promulgated by Stacey Abrams, who's promoting a multi-million-dollar misinformation campaign here in Georgia and across the country to raise millions for herself and her voting organizations on the back of hardworking Georgians, who have now lost a $100-million opportunity to host the All-Star Game. As the former commissioner said, baseball must rise above politics. That's what our country wants, but the President, the MLB, have drawn this country into a divisive moment based on complete lies...
"If [Biden] bothered to read the law - the Election Integrity Act - he would see that it expands voting opportunities, it increases integrity, the majority of Georgians supported more safeguards after our election. In fact, 74 percent of Georgians support having voter ID, same numbers across the country. There was a real opportunity here to have a dialogue and ask questions about it, but he succumbed to the cancel culture, the pressure from Stacey Abrams and this orchestrated campaign to raise money ... and I commend the Masters for keeping things going. Companies are going to need a clause that's a 'Stacey Abrams Risk Factor' that, if they get involved in these politics, it could cost them revenues, customers, loyalty, brand equity, and so forth. So, this is an important learning moment to make sure that we have the right information before we make decisions that hurt hardworking Georgians, small businesses - 30 percent of whom are Black-owned."

name: Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress
subject: Take our infrastructure poll
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress
body:
President Biden released his infrastructure proposal last week and while there are some key victories in the proposal, one thing is for certain:
# [](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/143?refcode=em20210407-1996-header&t=1&akid=1996%2E2526796%2Ek9WWJk)
President Biden released his infrastructure proposal last week and while there are some key victories in the proposal, one thing is for certain:
**It’s not enough.** We are in a devastating economic moment, millions of people are unemployed, and we have a crippled healthcare system and a planetary crisis on our hands.
**Alexandria has been clear that $10 trillion over 10 years is what’s required** to create tens of millions of good union jobs, shore up our healthcare, infrastructure, and housing, and do it in a way that rapidly draws down our carbon emissions.
[But we want to know: Do you agree with Alexandria that we need to tackle our climate and economic crisis head on with a $10 trillion dollar investment? Take our poll now:](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/signup/infrastructure_poll/?source=em20210407-1996&t=2&akid=1996%2E2526796%2Ek9WWJk)
**[Yes](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/signup/infrastructure_poll/?source=em20210407-1996&t=3&akid=1996%2E2526796%2Ek9WWJk)**
**[No](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/signup/infrastructure_poll/?source=em20210407-1996&t=4&akid=1996%2E2526796%2Ek9WWJk)**
When this bill arrives in the House, Alexandria is prepared to work with her colleagues to ensure that the $2-2.5 trillion that Biden proposed is just a starting point.
$10 trillion over 10 years may sound like an eye-popping figure, but as the wealthiest nation in the history of the world – and given the scale of the crisis – we can and must go further.
This pandemic has opened the eyes of many to what living in a crisis feels like. The climate crisis is here and will only worsen — but we have the power to minimize the impacts if we act boldly.
This isn’t a progressives versus moderates issue. Even some of the most conservative members of the Democratic caucus, like Joe Manchin, have expressed support for doubling Biden’s proposal.
**We know that the pressure from our movement is working.** President Biden's proposal includes measures to strengthen unions and focus on communities hit hardest by climate change.
Democrats across the spectrum understand that we need a full economic mobilization that brings together an infrastructure and jobs creation plan to address the climate crisis and rampant income inequality.
[Will you let Alexandria know if you support a transformational climate and infrastructure investment? Take our poll now. ](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/signup/infrastructure_poll/?source=em20210407-1996&t=5&akid=1996%2E2526796%2Ek9WWJk)
We don’t have to send our kids to schools in crumbling buildings, struggle to get Internet access, or drive on broken roads. We can prevent the next crisis and build back our economy better than before.
Thank you for sharing your thoughts.
Team AOC

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ocasio-campaign?refcode=em20210407-1996-footer&t=6&refcode2=1996_2526796_k9WWJk&akid=1996%2E2526796%2Ek9WWJk)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/OcasioCortez/?t=7&akid=1996%2E2526796%2Ek9WWJk) | [](https://twitter.com/AOC?t=8&akid=1996%2E2526796%2Ek9WWJk) | [](https://www.instagram.com/aoc/?t=9&akid=1996%2E2526796%2Ek9WWJk)
Paid for by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you. But, if you'd like to receive fewer emails, [you can do so here](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/). If you'd like to update your contact information, **[click here](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/signup/did-your-information-change/?t=10&akid=1996%2E2526796%2Ek9WWJk)**. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, [click here to unsubscribe](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=11&akid=1996%2E2526796%2Ek9WWJk). To contribute via check, please address to Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress, PO Box 680080, Corona, NY 11368.
Email us: us@ocasiocortez.com

name: Roger Misso
subject: Not kidding - come hang out with Cory Booker tonight on Zoom!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Taking the Hill
body:
Peter,

When I was transitioning from active duty in the military, I was fortunate enough to sit down with Senator Cory Booker's staff. They were immensely kind and helpful in talking a new veteran through what life was like on Capitol Hill and how to find gainful employment. That kindness was a reflection of the kind of person Cory Booker is.

That's why, tonight, I am incredibly proud that [_**he is joining Taking the Hill to help us kick-off our Deep Canvassing campaign strategy for the 2022 election cycle.**_](https://act.myngp.com/el/WlUgyF5OL7ZH4hwYDgZ-gkAp3GSeVIfojyqXxbS00uU=/qD5qX_KENitcFgNIFYa78rVb8RuVoaKLXRStaYu-c-0=)

Senator Booker knows what it takes to take on tough elections, hit the streets, and win. That's exactly what we are going to help our veteran and military family candidates do this year and next. And we need your help to do it.

The event is at 7:30 pm ET TONIGHT via Zoom. [_**Get your ticket now by clicking here!**_ And help us raise the last $14,000 it will take for us to launch our Deep Canvassing campaign to establish a majority of integrity in Congress.](https://act.myngp.com/el/WlUgyF5OL7ZH4hwYDgZ-gkAp3GSeVIfojyqXxbS00uU=/qD5qX_KENitcFgNIFYa78rVb8RuVoaKLXRStaYu-c-0=)

[](https://act.myngp.com/el/WlUgyF5OL7ZH4hwYDgZ-gkAp3GSeVIfojyqXxbS00uU=/qD5qX_KENitcFgNIFYa78rVb8RuVoaKLXRStaYu-c-0=)

Thank you! We look forward to seeing your smiling faces tonight[ at 7:30 pm ET](https://act.myngp.com/el/WlUgyF5OL7ZH4hwYDgZ-gkAp3GSeVIfojyqXxbS00uU=/qD5qX_KENitcFgNIFYa78rVb8RuVoaKLXRStaYu-c-0=)!

Yours in service,
**Roger**

Roger Misso
Executive Director
[Taking the Hill](https://act.myngp.com/el/WlUgyF5OL7ZH4hwYDgZ-gkAp3GSeVIfojyqXxbS00uU=/-cPi589FroegqqLS29IwxgWmeluugYJIxZsyC6GKS38=)

body:
The crisis at the border is no joke
---
| | | | | | [ ](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001YZ3pPUg_eNiJSZGhglqg6kK49tzJtKJe2gpyJsoXFi7lY7g0FfguJh96k_FCkia-_tRBgNg8FV2cB6_bDR1BHZE1xG22wABrk-jbcRSwflMTd2AQGMrk1biDhwZlV9cWHnvwFHUyiFWFgWxtPsHMXNdQR-q06am5xymFMYxULppkOYTw0Dxg1avbhYxux2VA&c=A7sCJZQQBGd8c04r1v-uOT6fdEWS51vHzahLvFVr-rGfBOO6j6wyeA==&ch=K69sRs-PWiF2QHFKux9pdq5LRVKvWUfjoON7i95P8elxbjTzuaLh8A==&jrc=1)
---
| Patriot,
There is a humanitarian crisis at our southern border, and the situation is only getting worse. President Biden has signaled to these people that America has open borders, and we can support anyone that comes seeking asylum.
We need to send the message to the Trafficker-in-Chief that he needs to put President Trump's immigration policies back in place before the situation at our southern border gets worse.
---
| | | [STOP THE TRAFFICKER-IN-CHIEF](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001YZ3pPUg_eNiJSZGhglqg6kK49tzJtKJe2gpyJsoXFi7lY7g0FfguJh96k_FCkia-_tRBgNg8FV2cB6_bDR1BHZE1xG22wABrk-jbcRSwflMTd2AQGMrk1biDhwZlV9cWHnvwFHUyiFWFgWxtPsHMXNdQR-q06am5xymFMYxULppkOYTw0Dxg1avbhYxux2VA&c=A7sCJZQQBGd8c04r1v-uOT6fdEWS51vHzahLvFVr-rGfBOO6j6wyeA==&ch=K69sRs-PWiF2QHFKux9pdq5LRVKvWUfjoON7i95P8elxbjTzuaLh8A==&jrc=1)

The American people need to see what's going on at these detention facilities because they would feel very differently about President Biden's open borders agenda. Now is our chance to stand up and hold the Biden administration accountable!

name: Jacobs for Congress
subject: Biden's Border Crisis
body:
---
| | | | | | |
---
---
Friend, Biden has slapped an open sign on our southern border resulting in a 15-year high in illegal crossings this month. His policies are reckless - causing crime, drugs, and human smuggling to sky-rocket, and DEMOCRATS ARE SILENT. Simply put, Biden is putting our nation's security in danger right now, so today I am headed to the border myself to see firsthand Biden's border crisis.
---
---
While he continues to hide in D.C. and ignore the pain, danger, and problems caused by his radical decision making, I'll be at our southern border with my colleagues listening to our brave border patrol agents. We need to get this crisis under control and to send a message to Biden that we won't stand for these dangerous policies. Can you rush $5, $10, or $25 right now to make it known we stand for law and order on the southern border?
---

name: Commander Kirk Lippold
subject: It’s hard for veterans to ask for help. We’re making it easier.
body:
The men and women of our nation’s military do everything they can to keep our families safe.

The men and women of our nation’s military do everything they can to keep our families safe.

Patriot,

[](https://63tqh.r.a.d.sendibm1.com/mk/cl/f/orSTV3wpVBAiUbtHpzsAdpm0XQdK77PYvrO_F2a973EiwNA1cbEOLvzj0fE-SFnv6xJdgm--uoj2u7n_v2GUF6B-VMVmqFz_7puu6lYjFdZgQYqmw-chh3_B9rqWyXCjyMpNhFnfLp9-d1g1ZIC9y4syuxIXWEtlnDUO2gPvaONd2COltktMkG4PENmZj85y-Qm6PiMbGORX26Nl1_gjLiR0kMX5SoyueYb9riWEtlijdvQ8vxG9qzGZrwT1U9jSnZzSdXKppwxYlE9zMxamxf4DKbPIvqoo2VyNyWPi7AG7ziq89QQ) The men and women of our nation’s military do everything they can to keep our families safe.

But when they need help, it can be hard for them to ask for it.

Help22 is working to give our nation’s veterans and active duty military the mental healthcare they need. **But our efforts are only as strong as your support.**

[**Will you make a tax-deductible donation of $11, $23, or even $47 to Help22, and ensure we have the resources we need to help our nation’s veterans?**](https://63tqh.r.a.d.sendibm1.com/mk/cl/f/38eQAuscAOHspHf7muN1e57qVfaH63DIy8LSU0ZH4xFoR-trNiMMuEPVQZonQvFeCoERdVrGzjNoAxkrQ_sKL2TAvsDpxOJ9S3d79mT5ypWRMMuRaEdFbnx0yUeahnJHjXikguzaaZnz9awwLnf5Jts8kXulNRKIvLzNFGIBxNPQUJRRL7-cJApt-dub3gzw1GjXdcq33dLcfmsm4gSQV2WWo7kKNAOGqFQEVfiOzjnXcrgqwRm9XwFMzt-8ksCpS1nTT0SssmwV_ojX9I91eMGNZPsM3bw7n2xe7Z33SCojwE3MmcQ)

They say “war is hell.”

It is, %%First Name|Patriot%%. I’ve been there.

So many of the men and women serving in our nation’s military come home with invisible scars—from PTSD to mental health issues.

They’re trained to be strong... so, far too often, **they don’t know how or where to seek help**.

Help22 is giving them the care they need. We’re assembling an **all-volunteer** team of esteemed psychiatrists, psychologists, social workers, and counselors across the nation.

For one day a month, they’ll offer **free counseling and life coaching to America’s heroes** , both in-person and remotely.

**Help22 knows that every single one of the 22 veteran suicides each day preventable... if we reach them first.**

[**Will you help us reach them... and save the life of a veteran, by making a tax-deductible donation of $11, $23, or more?**](https://63tqh.r.a.d.sendibm1.com/mk/cl/f/uZrRXumBeaOdkhGNYxlG5g8RcgmR6yipdNnOINt2dLAOENT5MSfljjQxUbum3qv6inrOM3xbK_6eSeN4yeuS2m2BhXOSPn72-WB7PFap1KUbzhHupp0ppJrsJGytUAMPhZSxZmyvzF4dwNguy-ZPj76IGWylN22o9_mAsYCzgZzUnuqMR9ef_diNr9lxoPoO3XYeMj2slq1x8PHTfz7JLeCyISztVHJrgYJT0nj5JRmAX6vj6_YzLpVlphdsNWkYbvwGO1oRI7hf7kGF8PfLvvxhoZDVQrE2miFXfuelRgGfmo2UUaI)

Thank you for your help.

Commander Kirk Lippold
US Navy (Ret.)

name: DEM ALERT (via House GOP)
subject: National Dems might KILL the Filibuster...on a technicality?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRCC and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
Please, stand with Trump today, and protect his legacy.

****
**SAVE THE FILIBUSTER**

The National Democrats really outdid themselves this time.

They're attempting to ERASE President Trump's legacy by relegating the Senate Filibuster into the dustbin of history.

As an informed American Patriot, Fellow Patriot, there's no doubt you know the**National Democrats, led by New York Liberal Chuck Schumer, have tried and FAILED again and again to get rid of this important step in our legislative process.**

They MUST be stopped because protecting the filibuster=******protecting Trump 's America First legacy.****** The Senate is being overrun with Socialist Left Wingers and we CANNOT let that happen to the House.

[**PROTECT THE FILIBUSTER, STAND WITH TRUMP**](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001p5qSURNVDIZG7x8ItgBEAEYtzEh2j2zgGOrJ5rrJcRDOr56ws4r0GX5iIyS4uTZKwOCGQAS7hZlyKhC4XCtMlziLZrfrkJFaTE4LoNZ7X2AsZFxFNpPG-9TGULLquYWzW7a8GvT1xx3YjHWKpgUBllGj5_SwMVvlb2eWf-Y_wQY_Uq8tShC0M6eOKzfNCemmzHQNyjDIqyTsoVMpv0jm1S2X2aeit-CCMKCU3in2wLGNos3tqz_e9IAK-P_pdh2jdIFH-5Ih6sdr6OD6tThVmwmUKJGWBDER6NZwpJOXHwQiYMF51UlaeY02cc4jQqWHTk9KpfEOl58A9lzQI29PJSVVKNhcxv3pCMc1qLrA5OUf6l4zibjtqe3LA4VsrAtwgthe9TLe1gK6ojAcsRiX6BIftJZOiP1SzivS2eujzZJOwKv0mDuFyveM_r3Fpdnz47fI5xuKsJ4pc0BVXSu8t9hNWNho_37M7xNcbfAjfVA=&c=7BHffFAyC9I9dmjkSK4ldprEYq2a_gl5n0Hcz2kUOdB14srR4zjDDA==&ch=2vti5LTDdPfsBUMAmNDMQqe-8v6URLrVm5U-cQjQpAcWD8xZsGf0yA==)

**_5x MATCHED UNTIL MIDNIGHT_**

The Senate is supposed to be the slow, deliberate upper chamber that cools the fast-paced nature of the House.

Since the National Democrats can't get rid of the filibuster, they're relying on budget reconciliation instructions that would allow them to _**b ar filibusters for 2 additional bills this year. **_

We cannot let that happen, Fellow Patriot.

Please, stand with Trump today, and protect his legacy. Don't let the Senate's breakdown of the American legislative process happen in the House!

Rush your donation TODAY. Protect the filibuster and President Trump's Legacy!

Sincerely,

Annamarie
House GOP HQ

P.S. Trump's legacy is under attack. Protect the filibuster and protect Trump's America First legacy!

As an informed American Patriot, Fellow Patriot, there's no doubt you know theNational Democrats, led by New York Liberal Chuck Schumer, have tried and FAILED again and again to get rid of this important step in our legislative process. They MUST be stopped because protecting the filibuster=**protecting Trump 's America First legacy.** The Senate is being overrun with Socialist Left Wingers and we CANNOT let that happen to the House. == 5x MATCHED UNTIL MIDNIGHT The Senate is supposed to be the slow, deliberate upper chamber that cools the fast-paced nature of the House. Since the National Democrats can't get rid of the filibuster, they're relying on budget reconciliation instructions that would allow them to b ar filibusters for 2 additional bills this year. We cannot let that happen, Fellow Patriot. Please, stand with Trump today, and protect his legacy. Don't let the Senate's breakdown of the American legislative process happen in the House! Rush your donation TODAY. Protect the filibuster and President Trump's Legacy! Sincerely, Annamarie House GOP HQ P.S. Trump's legacy is under attack. name: John Burke
subject: Public Safety in California
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Faulconer for Governor 2022
body:
This is how Kevin Faulconer made San Diego one of the safest major cities in California. Read more >>
Peter As the mayor of San Diego, Kevin Faulconer made keeping our streets and communities safe a top priority. Now he’s ready to take the same level-headed approach to all of California as our next governor. **The issue of public safety should NOT be inflammatory talking points that are designed to fire up whatever side of the political argument you’re on. Instead, we must come together to sup port reasonable initiatives that keep everyone safe.** Kevin was on the cutting edge of police and community partnership in San Diego. He knows these solutions can work for our entire state too. Here are just a few of the things that Kevin Faulconer accomplished as the mayor of San Diego:
* Instead of defunding the police, he made sure they had the tools they needed to do their jobs properly and effectively.
* Adopted the use of body cameras to increase trust and accountability —one of the first big cities in the country to do this.
* Reached a landmark agreement to make our salaries more competitive and retain good officers. Today, we’re at a 10-year high in terms of police staffing.
* Led the state by banning the use of carotid restraint: The SDPD was first in the region to do so, and now it’s statewide law.
* Introduced stand-alone de-escalation and duty to intervene policies to ensure officers are following policies and procedures under strict penalty.

**Thanks to these changes, San Diego is one of the safest major cities in all of California!**
Other cities across California caved to demands to cut police budgets, and now many are reversing course after seeing the disastrous effects of doing so.
_Defunding the police is not the answer, it's a failed experiment. The real answer is better-funded and properly-trained police officers._
We need to foster positive relationships between the police and the communities they serve. Kevin was able to do that in San Diego, and now he needs your help to bring that mindset to the state level.
**It’s time for REAL change in California. CHIP IN NOW to help make Kevin’s vision for California a reality!** [**CHIP IN $5 NOW >>**](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/b8d0d2556ccf170a3a89ac0c84d83476/34943/d7a756c1b1c220d1/f877807ffcdacc50c3d6b838967d376c/34943) [**CHIP IN $25 NOW >>**](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/b8d0d2556ccf170a3a89ac0c84d83476/34943/d7a756c1b1c220d1/ef9253ea1fa943efc3d6b838967d376c/34943) [**CHIP IN $50 NOW >>**](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/b8d0d2556ccf170a3a89ac0c84d83476/34943/d7a756c1b1c220d1/630b045963dc7a21c3d6b838967d376c/34943) [**CHIP IN $100 NOW >>**](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/b8d0d2556ccf170a3a89ac0c84d83476/34943/d7a756c1b1c220d1/82fd69ad924bc6c9c3d6b838967d376c/34943) Thanks for your help,
John Burke, Communications Director | | [](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/b8d0d2556ccf170a3a89ac0c84d83476/34943/d7a756c1b1c220d1/58e502d581e5076ec3d6b838967d376c/34943) | [](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/b8d0d2556ccf170a3a89ac0c84d83476/34943/d7a756c1b1c220d1/c512b94df6c158d5c3d6b838967d376c/34943) | [](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/b8d0d2556ccf170a3a89ac0c84d83476/34943/d7a756c1b1c220d1/15439e347901adb8c3d6b838967d376c/34943)

Democrats have a razor-thin 50-50 majority in the Senate, and you can bet that Mitch McConnell is doing whatever it takes to get the GOP back in power.

name: Judicial Watch Corruption Chronicles
subject: Maryland Opens “Special Clinic” to Give Latinos COVID-19 Vaccines in Biggest Counties
body:
While many Maryland residents wait patiently to receive their government-funded COVID-19 vaccine, the state’s two biggest counties—both illegal immigrant sanctuaries—have launched a “special clinic” to inoculate 600 Latinos a week.

---
| | | Because no one is above the law! | April 07, 2021
---|---|---
| | [](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=53353&L=22565&F=H&)
---
# [Maryland Opens “Special Clinic” to Give Latinos COVID-19 Vaccines in Biggest Counties](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=53353&L=22565&F=H&)
While many Maryland residents wait patiently to receive their government-funded COVID-19 vaccine, the state’s two biggest counties—both illegal immigrant sanctuaries—have launched a “special clinic” to inoculate 600 Latinos a week. The exclusive operation will be stationed at the Adventist HealthCare facility in Takoma Park, which is situated in Montgomery County, Maryland’s most populous. The shots will also be offered to Latinos who live in nearby Prince George’s County. Recipients will be “preselected” by an area open borders group, Casa de Maryland, and a Latino Health Initiative launched by Montgomery County two decades ago. In a statement announcing the venture public officials claim that it will help overcome inequities in the vaccine rollout as well as general health disparities that plague poor minority communities.
[Read More](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=53353&L=22565&F=H&)
|
---
| |
---
### [The Supreme Court Drops the Ball on Clinton Email Testimony ](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=53353&L=22566&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZGVlcC1kaXZlL3Njb3R1cy1jbGludG9uLXRlc3RpbW9ueS8/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj1jb3JydXB0aW9uK2Nocm9uaWNsZXMmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycyZ1dG1fY29udGVudD0yMDIxMDQwNzIyMzQ0Mg==) Judicial Watch “Now it’s really outrageous,” Fitton stated. “Judicial Watch has engaged in significant historical work on the email scandal, but when the Supreme Court ratifies a decision that gives special protection to Hillary Clinton, it’s disturbing.” The case, however, “isn’t over,” according to Fitton. “We’re still fighting in the lower court for additional discovery that’s already been granted.” [READ MORE](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=53353&L=22566&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZGVlcC1kaXZlL3Njb3R1cy1jbGludG9uLXRlc3RpbW9ueS8/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj1jb3JydXB0aW9uK2Nocm9uaWNsZXMmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycyZ1dG1fY29udGVudD0yMDIxMDQwNzIyMzQ0Mg==)
---
### [Crime Surges as Progressive Policies Gain Ground ](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=53353&L=22567&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvaW52ZXN0aWdhdGl2ZS1idWxsZXRpbi9jcmltZS1zdXJnZXMtYXMtcHJvZ3Jlc3NpdmUtcG9saWNpZXMtZ2Fpbi1ncm91bmQvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249Y29ycnVwdGlvbitjaHJvbmljbGVzJnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnMmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9MjAyMTA0MDcyMjM0NDI=) Judicial Watch New York often is a bell weather for change in urban America. That’s the case these days with issues of crime and punishment. And with the retirement of Cyrus Vance Jr., the influential post of Manhattan District Attorney—the second most powerful prosecuting office in the U.S. after the Justice Department—is up for grabs in June.
