clean_body: While many Maryland residents wait patiently to receive their government-funded COVID-19 vaccine, the state’s two biggest counties—both illegal immigrant sanctuaries—have launched a “special clinic” to inoculate 600 Latinos a week. | | | Because no one is above the law! | April 07, 2021 ---|---|--- | | While many Maryland residents wait patiently to receive their government-funded COVID-19 vaccine, the state’s two biggest counties—both illegal immigrant sanctuaries—have launched a “special clinic” to inoculate 600 Latinos a week. The exclusive operation will be stationed at the Adventist HealthCare facility in Takoma Park, which is situated in Montgomery County, Maryland’s most populous. The shots will also be offered to Latinos who live in nearby Prince George’s County. Recipients will be “preselected” by an area open borders group, Casa de Maryland, and a Latino Health Initiative launched by Montgomery County two decades ago. In a statement announcing the venture public officials claim that it will help overcome inequities in the vaccine rollout as well as general health disparities that plague poor minority communities. | | | == Judicial Watch “Now it’s really outrageous,” Fitton stated. “Judicial Watch has engaged in significant historical work on the email scandal, but when the Supreme Court ratifies a decision that gives special protection to Hillary Clinton, it’s disturbing.” The case, however, “isn’t over,” according to Fitton. “We’re still fighting in the lower court for additional discovery that’s already been granted.” == = Judicial Watch New York often is a bell weather for change in urban America. That’s the case these days with issues of crime and punishment. And with the retirement of Cyrus Vance Jr., the influential post of Manhattan District Attorney—the second most powerful prosecuting office in the U.S. after the Justice Department—is up for grabs in June. = Judicial Watch Judicial Watch announced that it filed an amici curiae brief alongside the Allied Educational Foundation (AEF) in support of Students for Fair Admission’s petition for a writ of certiorari to the Supreme Court challenging the decision of the U.S. District Court for the First Circuit that upholds Harvard College’s race-based affirmative action admissions program. (Students for Fair Admission v. President & Fellows of Harvard College (No. 20-1199)). = = | CLIPS == == | | | | | | Keep our investigators on the job uncovering the truth: | = | | | | ---|---|--- = = = Judicial Watch, Inc. 425 3rd St Sw Ste 800, Washington, DC 20024 202.646.5172 (C)2017-2021, All Rights Reserved = |

name: =?utf-8?Q?John=20Fetterman?=
subject: My dude Pat Toomey
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fetterman for PA
body:
#
We’re really gonna miss Senator Pat Toomey. (LOL just kidding)
_Senator who?_ Uhhh... This dude. 👇
[](https://johnfetterman.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=167e8489a38c83af7b1c44995&id=c942a0d4eb&e=0490676c9f)
You don’t have to be from Pennsylvania to know how bad Pat Toomey is. I could write yinz an email about how he’s spent his 10+ years in the Senate hiding from Pennsylvanians, or how he wants PA to adopt Georgia’s new racist voting law. I could write you a whole entire email just about that.
**But the #1 thing you need to know about Pat Toomey is this: He is not seeking reelection, making Pennsylvania the *most competitive* Senate race of 2022.**
That’s why, today, I’m humbly asking:
[**Will you please make a donation of $25 or more to our campaign? This is our chance to add another Pennsylvania Senate seat to our razor-thin Democratic majority — and the journey starts right here, right now.**](https://johnfetterman.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=167e8489a38c83af7b1c44995&id=64792ff74e&e=0490676c9f)
**[Contribute $25](https://johnfetterman.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=167e8489a38c83af7b1c44995&id=d8d080af81&e=0490676c9f)**
It's critical that we build support early-on **because we know the GOP will go *hard* to try and stop us.**
After all, history speaks for itself. By the end of Q1 of the 2016 cycle — the last time this Senate seat was contested — Pat Toomey had more than $7.2 MILLION cash on hand. It ended up being the most expensive Senate seat of the 2016 campaign cycle, with GOP super PACs dumping buckets of money into Pennsylvania.
**The GOP was desperate to keep this Senate seat in 2016, and you bet they’re gonna be desperate to keep this seat now that my dude Pat is officially retiring.**
[**Let’s show them what we’re made of. Will you chip in now?**](https://johnfetterman.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=167e8489a38c83af7b1c44995&id=09b75ce154&e=0490676c9f)
**[Contribute $25](https://johnfetterman.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=167e8489a38c83af7b1c44995&id=41a0dfe1aa&e=0490676c9f)** Thanks for all you do,
John
John Fetterman
Lieutenant Governor of Pennsylvania
**[Donate](https://johnfetterman.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=167e8489a38c83af7b1c44995&id=46a86b5d15&e=0490676c9f)**
---
Paid for by Fetterman for PA
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you. But, if you'd like to receive fewer emails, [you can do so here](https://johnfetterman.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=167e8489a38c83af7b1c44995&id=25293b35a2&e=0490676c9f). If you need to remove yourself from our email list, [click here to unsubscribe](https://johnfetterman.us1.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=167e8489a38c83af7b1c44995&id=864dcb2a0a&e=0490676c9f&c=5e975729a5). Mail us: Fetterman for PA, PO Box 6061, Pittsburgh.

clean_body: | running for office or working on a campaign Peter — I need your help! Do you know someone running for office or working on a campaign in 2021 or 2022? Then please forward them this email!! We’re on a mission to reach every candidate and campaign staffer possible. We want to make sure they know about the hundreds of resources available to HELP THEM WIN. | At NDTC, we know the difference between winning and losing can come down to knowing how the game is played. That’s why over 1500 candidates turned to us during the 2020 election season for the tools they needed to run effective campaigns. So, whether you know someone just getting started in politics or a political pro — we have the tools they need to build a winning campaign. Forward this email to FIVE friends today and let’s drive the blue wave far over the next two years. We have resources to help folks of all different backgrounds, skill sets, and experience win their next race. Thanks for your help!! Onward, Kelly Kelly Dietrich, Founder and CEO, National Democratic Training Committee P.S. — If you think they’ll need a little convincing, let them know we’ve got the support of President Biden and Vice President Harris!! | This message was sent to: | Connect with us on social media! | | | ---|---|--- | ---|--- Paid for by the National Democratic Training Committee, TrainDemocrats.org, not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. 910 17th Street NW, Suite 925, Washington, DC 20006
